desi-gud.title: Desi Gud
desi-gud.description: Hand-crafted chemical-free jaggery blocks from the heart of sugarcane belts.

details.essenceQuote: "A heirloom recipe passed down through generations, our Desi Gud is made by slowly reducing fresh sugarcane juice in shallow iron vats, retaining all natural minerals and its signature earthy caramel notes."
details.essenceDesc: Unlike refined sugar, our jaggery is unrefined and non-centrifuged. It is prepared using traditional methods without any sulfur or chemical clarificants. Each block is hand-poured, ensuring a texture that melts beautifully.

reviewsData.name: Ananya R.
reviewsData.quote: The depth of flavor is incomparable.

reviewsData.name: Siddharth M.
reviewsData.quote: Knowing it's 100% chemical-free gives me so much peace of mind.

desi-ghee.title: Sona Desi Ghee
desi-ghee.description: Traditional bilona churned ghee from happy A2 cows. Rich in aroma and nutrients.

details.essenceQuote: "Slow-churned to perfection using earthen pots and a wooden bilona."
details.essenceDesc: Unlike refined sugar, our jaggery is unrefined and non-centrifuged. It is prepared using traditional methods without any sulfur or chemical clarificants. Each block is hand-poured, ensuring a texture that melts beautifully.
